title: CoreCommands
description: CoreCommands adds several helpful player commands. Players can set and teleport to home or spawn points, send teleport requests to other players, and create warp points for easy navigation. Admins have special commands to set and delete.
body:
# CoreCommands Mod

**CoreCommands** is a Minecraft mod that adds the essential commands a server needs - homes, warps, teleporting, moderation tools, and area protection - in one lightweight package. Everything works across dimensions, saves to disk, and lands you somewhere safe. Here's an overview of the commands and features.

## Homes & Warps:
| Command                   | Description                                                  |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/home [name]`            | Teleports home. With one home it goes straight there; with several it lets you pick. |
| `/sethome [name]`         | Sets a home at your location. No name sets a default home.   |
| `/delhome <name>`         | Deletes a home.                                              |
| `/homes` (`/listhomes`)   | Lists your homes (clickable).                                |
| `/warp [name]`            | Teleports to a warp, or lists them.                          |
| `/warps` (`/listwarps`)   | Lists all warps (clickable).                                 |
| `/spawn`                  | Teleports to the server spawn.                               |

## Teleporting:
| Command                   | Description                                                  |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/tpa <player>`           | Sends a teleport request to a player.                        |
| `/tpahere <player>`       | Asks a player to teleport to you.                            |
| `/tpaccept`               | Accepts a teleport request.                                  |
| `/tphereaccept`           | Accepts a "teleport to me" request.                          |
| `/tpdeny`                 | Denies a pending request.                                    |
| `/tpcancel`               | Cancels a request you sent.                                  |
| `/back`                   | Returns to your last location or death point (safely).       |
| `/rtp`                    | Teleports to a random safe spot above ground.                |
| `/top`                    | Teleports to the highest block above you.                    |

## Communication:
| Command                       | Description                                          |
|-------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------|
| `/msg <player> <message>`     | Sends a private message (also `/w`, `/tell`).        |
| `/reply <message>` (`/r`)     | Replies to your last conversation.                   |
| `/ignore <player>`            | Ignores or unignores a player.                       |
| `/msgtoggle`                  | Toggles private messages on/off.                     |
| `/helpop <message>`           | Messages online staff.                               |
| `/rules`                      | Displays the server rules.                           |

## Utility & Info:
| Command                   | Description                                                  |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/list`                   | Shows who's online.                                          |
| `/tps`                    | Server performance, memory, and uptime.                      |
| `/near [radius]`          | Lists nearby players.                                        |
| `/seen <player>`          | Shows when a player was last online.                         |
| `/playtime`               | Shows your total playtime.                                   |
| `/ping`                   | Shows your connection ping.                                  |
| `/afk`                    | Toggles AFK status.                                          |
| `/enderchest` (`/ec`)     | Opens your ender chest anywhere.                             |
| `/workbench` (`/craft`)   | Opens a crafting table anywhere.                             |
| `/hat`                    | Wears the item in your hand.                                 |
| `/chelp`                  | Opens the clickable command list.                            |

## Staff Commands (op only):
| Command                          | Description                                            |
|----------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| `/setspawn`                      | Sets the server spawn.                                  |
| `/setwarp <name>`                | Creates a warp at your location.                        |
| `/delwarp <name>`                | Deletes a warp.                                         |
| `/tppos <x> <y> <z>`             | Teleports to exact coordinates.                         |
| `/tphere <player>`               | Teleports a player to you.                              |
| `/tpall`                         | Teleports everyone to you.                              |
| `/gm <mode> [player]`            | Changes gamemode (also `/gmc`, `/gms`, `/gma`, `/gmsp`).|
| `/fly`, `/god`, `/heal`, `/feed` | Toggle flight / invulnerability, heal, feed.            |
| `/speed <1-10> [player]`         | Sets movement speed.                                    |
| `/vanish`                        | Becomes invisible to non-staff.                         |
| `/mute`, `/unmute <player>`      | Mutes or unmutes a player.                              |
| `/freeze <player>`               | Freezes a player in place.                              |
| `/warn`, `/warnings`, `/clearwarnings` | Manage player warnings.                          |
| `/tempban`, `/unban`, `/checkban` | Temporary bans with a duration and reason.            |
| `/invsee <player>`               | Views a player's inventory (with armor and off-hand).   |
| `/ci [player]`                   | Clears an inventory.                                    |
| `/repair`, `/more`               | Repairs or refills the held item.                       |
| `/smite <player>`                | Strikes a player with lightning.                        |
| `/broadcast <message>`           | Sends a server-wide announcement.                       |
| `/socialspy`, `/sc`              | Spy on private messages / toggle staff chat.            |
| `/cc reload`, `/cc save`         | Reloads config or force-saves data.                     |

## Region Protection (op only):
| Command                                  | Description                                  |
|------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| `/region wand`                           | Gives the selection wand (left = pos1, right = pos2). |
| `/region create <name>`                  | Creates a protected region from your selection. |
| `/region delete <name>`                  | Deletes a region.                            |
| `/region list` / `/region info <name>`   | Lists regions or shows details.              |
| `/region flag <name> <flag> <deny\|allow>` | Sets a protection flag.                    |
| `/region addmember` / `removemember`     | Adds or removes a bypass member.             |
| `/region priority <name> <level>`        | Sets which region wins where they overlap.   |
| `/region redefine <name>`                | Updates a region's bounds.                   |
| `/region tp <name>`                      | Teleports safely to a region.                |

Region flags: break, place, interact, pvp, mob-damage, explosions, drop-item, pickup-item, hunger, fall-damage, entry, exit, notify, damage, container, heal, mob-spawning.

## Features:
- **Homes & Warps** - multiple homes and warps with tab completion and clickable lists. Homes save instantly.
- **Safe Teleporting** - homes, warps, spawn, back, and region teleports never drop you into blocks, lava, or the void.
- **Smart /rtp** - smooth, lag-free random teleport that always lands above ground (never caves), respects the world border, and has an adjustable cooldown.
- **Region Protection** - wand-based claims that cover full height, with per-region flags, member bypass, and a priority system.
- **Moderation Suite** - mute, freeze, warnings, temp bans, vanish, social spy, and staff chat.
- **Cross-Dimension** - everything works in the Overworld, Nether, and End.
- **Data Persistence** - all data is saved as JSON in `config/corecommands/`, auto-saved every 5 minutes and on shutdown.
- **Configurable** - `config.json` controls max homes, RTP range/cooldown, TPA timeout, full-height claims, update checks, and more.
- **Update Notifications** - staff are told in-game when a new version is available.
